profile.name: Cersei Lannister
profile.summary: Self-made sovereign who seized the Iron Throne through strategic elimination of rivals, institutional manipulation, and absolute refusal to accept the limitations imposed by a patriarchal power structure. Twenty-five years navigating the highest levels of Westerosi politics — from Queen Consort to Queen Regent to sole ruler. Demonstrated that power is not given; it is taken.

evidence.outcome: Orchestrated the elimination of the High Sparrow and all political rivals in a single decisive action at the Great Sept
evidence.description: Orchestrated the elimination of the High Sparrow and all political rivals in a single decisive action at the Great Sept

evidence.outcome: Seized the Iron Throne without hereditary claim — purely through strategic positioning and elimination of alternatives
evidence.description: Seized the Iron Throne without hereditary claim — purely through strategic positioning and elimination of alternatives

evidence.outcome: Maintained control of King's Landing through military alliance with the Iron Fleet and Golden Company mercenaries
evidence.description: Maintained control of King's Landing through military alliance with the Iron Fleet and Golden Company mercenaries

evidence.outcome: Navigated 17 years of court politics as Queen Consort while building independent power base
evidence.description: Navigated 17 years of court politics as Queen Consort while building independent power base

evidence.outcome: Manipulated Small Council appointments to ensure loyalty over competence across multiple administrations
evidence.description: Manipulated Small Council appointments to ensure loyalty over competence across multiple administrations

evidence.outcome: Identified and neutralized threats from Ned Stark, Margaery Tyrell, and the High Sparrow through distinct tactical approaches
evidence.description: Identified and neutralized threats from Ned Stark, Margaery Tyrell, and the High Sparrow through distinct tactical approaches

evidence.outcome: Used the Mountain as enforcement mechanism to maintain compliance among reluctant allies
evidence.description: Used the Mountain as enforcement mechanism to maintain compliance among reluctant allies

evidence.outcome: Deployed wildfire destruction of the Sept as demonstration of willingness to use extreme measures
evidence.description: Deployed wildfire destruction of the Sept as demonstration of willingness to use extreme measures

evidence.outcome: Maintained psychological dominance over subordinates through calculated displays of ruthlessness
evidence.description: Maintained psychological dominance over subordinates through calculated displays of ruthlessness

evidence.outcome: Secured Euron Greyjoy's Iron Fleet through marriage alliance — providing critical naval power
evidence.description: Secured Euron Greyjoy's Iron Fleet through marriage alliance — providing critical naval power

evidence.outcome: Contracted the Golden Company — 20,000 mercenaries — through Iron Bank financing
evidence.description: Contracted the Golden Company — 20,000 mercenaries — through Iron Bank financing

evidence.outcome: Maintained Lannister-Tyrell alliance through Joffrey and Tommen's marriages despite underlying hostility
evidence.description: Maintained Lannister-Tyrell alliance through Joffrey and Tommen's marriages despite underlying hostility

evidence.outcome: Restructured Crown debt with the Iron Bank of Braavos using Tyrell gold seized after their elimination
evidence.description: Restructured Crown debt with the Iron Bank of Braavos using Tyrell gold seized after their elimination

evidence.outcome: Used Lannister wealth as political tool to buy loyalty from sellswords, lords, and institutions
evidence.description: Used Lannister wealth as political tool to buy loyalty from sellswords, lords, and institutions

evidence.outcome: Understood that military power follows financial power and prioritized treasury control
evidence.description: Understood that military power follows financial power and prioritized treasury control

evidence.outcome: Made the decision to destroy the Great Sept — accepting massive civilian casualties to eliminate existential political threats
evidence.description: Made the decision to destroy the Great Sept — accepting massive civilian casualties to eliminate existential political threats

evidence.outcome: Managed the fallout of Joffrey's assassination while maintaining governance continuity
evidence.description: Managed the fallout of Joffrey's assassination while maintaining governance continuity

evidence.outcome: Prepared King's Landing defenses against Daenerys's invasion including civilian shield strategy
evidence.description: Prepared King's Landing defenses against Daenerys's invasion including civilian shield strategy

evidence.outcome: Managed transition of power from Robert to Joffrey through manipulation of succession protocols
evidence.description: Managed transition of power from Robert to Joffrey through manipulation of succession protocols

evidence.outcome: Positioned Tommen as controllable successor after Joffrey's death
evidence.description: Positioned Tommen as controllable successor after Joffrey's death

evidence.outcome: After losing all heirs, seized power directly rather than allowing succession vacuum
evidence.description: After losing all heirs, seized power directly rather than allowing succession vacuum

evidence.outcome: Maintained spy networks through Qyburn that rivaled Varys's intelligence apparatus
evidence.description: Maintained spy networks through Qyburn that rivaled Varys's intelligence apparatus

evidence.outcome: Identified threats from the Tyrells' growing influence over Tommen before others recognized the pattern
evidence.description: Identified threats from the Tyrells' growing influence over Tommen before others recognized the pattern

evidence.outcome: Tracked rival movements and alliances through informant networks across the Seven Kingdoms
evidence.description: Tracked rival movements and alliances through informant networks across the Seven Kingdoms

evidence.outcome: Weaponized the Faith Militant against the Tyrells before it turned on her — demonstrating understanding of institutional dynamics
evidence.description: Weaponized the Faith Militant against the Tyrells before it turned on her — demonstrating understanding of institutional dynamics

evidence.outcome: Manipulated trial procedures and judicial processes to her advantage across multiple proceedings
evidence.description: Manipulated trial procedures and judicial processes to her advantage across multiple proceedings

evidence.outcome: Used royal authority to rewrite institutional rules when existing structures opposed her objectives
evidence.description: Used royal authority to rewrite institutional rules when existing structures opposed her objectives

evidence.outcome: Recruited Qyburn — dismissed by the Citadel — and empowered him to become the most effective intelligence operative in Westeros
evidence.description: Recruited Qyburn — dismissed by the Citadel — and empowered him to become the most effective intelligence operative in Westeros

evidence.outcome: Identified Euron Greyjoy's ambition as exploitable asset and structured alliance accordingly
evidence.description: Identified Euron Greyjoy's ambition as exploitable asset and structured alliance accordingly

evidence.outcome: Built personal guard and enforcement apparatus outside traditional Kingsguard structures
evidence.description: Built personal guard and enforcement apparatus outside traditional Kingsguard structures

evidence.outcome: Maintained the Lannister brand as the dominant political force in Westeros for over two decades
evidence.description: Maintained the Lannister brand as the dominant political force in Westeros for over two decades

evidence.outcome: Projected power and authority through deliberate use of imagery, ceremony, and public appearances
evidence.description: Projected power and authority through deliberate use of imagery, ceremony, and public appearances

evidence.outcome: Controlled the narrative around the Crown's legitimacy despite multiple succession crises
evidence.description: Controlled the narrative around the Crown's legitimacy despite multiple succession crises

evidence.outcome: Accepted catastrophic risk in the Sept destruction — gambling that political gains would outweigh public backlash
evidence.description: Accepted catastrophic risk in the Sept destruction — gambling that political gains would outweigh public backlash

evidence.outcome: Refused to commit forces against the Night King — betting that her rivals would weaken themselves fighting the dead
evidence.description: Refused to commit forces against the Night King — betting that her rivals would weaken themselves fighting the dead

evidence.outcome: Made the calculated decision to fight Daenerys rather than surrender — preferring destruction to submission
evidence.description: Made the calculated decision to fight Daenerys rather than surrender — preferring destruction to submission

evidence.outcome: Prepared King's Landing's scorpion defenses against dragon attack
evidence.description: Prepared King's Landing's scorpion defenses against dragon attack

evidence.outcome: Positioned civilian populations as strategic deterrent against Targaryen forces
evidence.description: Positioned civilian populations as strategic deterrent against Targaryen forces

evidence.outcome: Fortified Red Keep as last-stand position with provisions and escape routes
evidence.description: Fortified Red Keep as last-stand position with provisions and escape routes

evidence.outcome: Restored the Faith Militant — a banned institution — as political weapon against rivals
evidence.description: Restored the Faith Militant — a banned institution — as political weapon against rivals

evidence.outcome: Used royal pardons, attainders, and decrees to reward allies and punish enemies outside judicial process
evidence.description: Used royal pardons, attainders, and decrees to reward allies and punish enemies outside judicial process

evidence.outcome: Manipulated inheritance law, succession rules, and noble titles to consolidate Lannister power
evidence.description: Manipulated inheritance law, succession rules, and noble titles to consolidate Lannister power

evidence.outcome: Commanded respect and fear from lords, generals, and foreign diplomats through sheer force of personality
evidence.description: Commanded respect and fear from lords, generals, and foreign diplomats through sheer force of personality

evidence.outcome: Maintained composure and authority during Walk of Atonement — using the experience to fuel rather than diminish her power
evidence.description: Maintained composure and authority during Walk of Atonement — using the experience to fuel rather than diminish her power

evidence.outcome: Projected certainty and control even when her strategic position was deteriorating
evidence.description: Projected certainty and control even when her strategic position was deteriorating

evidence.outcome: Managed relationship with Iron Bank of Braavos including debt restructuring and new credit facilities
evidence.description: Managed relationship with Iron Bank of Braavos including debt restructuring and new credit facilities

evidence.outcome: Contracted and deployed the Golden Company mercenary force from Essos
evidence.description: Contracted and deployed the Golden Company mercenary force from Essos

evidence.outcome: Negotiated terms with Euron Greyjoy's naval forces including compensation and political commitments
evidence.description: Negotiated terms with Euron Greyjoy's naval forces including compensation and political commitments

evidence.outcome: Used shame, humiliation, and public spectacle as tools of political control
evidence.description: Used shame, humiliation, and public spectacle as tools of political control

evidence.outcome: Exploited personal vulnerabilities of opponents including family loyalty, honor, and romantic attachment
evidence.description: Exploited personal vulnerabilities of opponents including family loyalty, honor, and romantic attachment

evidence.outcome: Maintained psychological pressure on Tyrion, Sansa, and other rivals through targeted emotional manipulation
evidence.description: Maintained psychological pressure on Tyrion, Sansa, and other rivals through targeted emotional manipulation

evidence.outcome: Maintained information compartmentalization around the Sept plot — preventing leaks until execution
evidence.description: Maintained information compartmentalization around the Sept plot — preventing leaks until execution

evidence.outcome: Used Qyburn's intelligence network to monitor threats from internal and external sources
evidence.description: Used Qyburn's intelligence network to monitor threats from internal and external sources

evidence.outcome: Protected sensitive information about her children's parentage for 17 years despite multiple near-exposures
evidence.description: Protected sensitive information about her children's parentage for 17 years despite multiple near-exposures

evidence.outcome: Maintained extensive knowledge of Westerosi and Essosi vintages — used wine service as diplomatic and social tool
evidence.description: Maintained extensive knowledge of Westerosi and Essosi vintages — used wine service as diplomatic and social tool

evidence.outcome: Demonstrated that even personal consumption habits can project power, control, and aristocratic authority
evidence.description: Demonstrated that even personal consumption habits can project power, control, and aristocratic authority

evidence.outcome: Used wine sharing as trust-building mechanism and, occasionally, as delivery system for political messaging
evidence.description: Used wine sharing as trust-building mechanism and, occasionally, as delivery system for political messaging

purpose: To prove that a woman can hold power on her own terms — not as consort, not as regent, but as sovereign — in a world built to prevent exactly that.

workHistory.title: Queen of the Seven Kingdoms
workHistory.description: Sole ruler following elimination of all rival claimants. Rebuilt military alliances, secured Iron Bank financing, and prepared King's Landing for siege against Targaryen invasion.

workHistory.title: Queen Regent
workHistory.description: Governed as regent during Tommen's minority and marriage to Margaery Tyrell. Navigated Faith Militant crisis, Tyrell political encroachment, and multiple assassination plots.

workHistory.title: Queen Regent
workHistory.description: Governed as power behind the throne during Joffrey's reign. Managed wartime politics, Lannister-Tyrell alliance, and internal court rivalries.

workHistory.title: Queen Consort
workHistory.description: Seventeen years as Queen Consort. Built independent political intelligence network, managed Lannister family interests at court, and positioned children for succession.

workHistory.title: Lady of House Lannister
workHistory.description: Raised as heir-apparent to Tywin Lannister's political legacy. Education in governance, alliance-building, and dynastic strategy.
